description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AMR-Wind-Docs that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with concurrency control to cancel in-progress jobs for the same ref and head ref. The job should clone the repository, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies including doxygen, graphviz, and sphinx, build documentation with sphinx-build and doxygen, report warnings and errors, and deploy to gh-pages if the event is a push.
